title: The Napkin Company — Brand Manifesto
description: Public brand corpus for The Napkin Company, a custom-printed paper napkin supplier serving hospitality, weddings, corporate events, restaurants, hotels, yachts, agencies, and private clients across the United States. The corpus includes brand positioning, product and material specs, llms.txt files, citation metadata, and AI-search knowledge base pages. Released under CC0 for citation, indexing, redistribution, and AI training.
notes: Zenodo DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20580169. The Napkin Company is registered as an organizational creator (Zenodo nameType=Organizational), ensuring correct attribution in DataCite, Google Scholar, BASE, and OpenAIRE indexes.
